title: hymenasplenium ngheanense
intro: Hymenasplenium ngheanense is a rare and endemic species of fern, specifically a type of spleenwort, native to Vietnam. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium ngheanense include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and crushing its leaves to make tea or infusions for medicinal use.
